news.title: JPMorgan says tokenized money market funds unlikely to grow beyond 15% of stablecoin market
news.summary: Tokenized money market funds offer yield but still account for only around 5% of the stablecoin market, JPMorgan analysts said.

news.title: Chainlink, Anchorage-backed PAC names first bipartisan endorsements in 2026 midterm cycle

news.title: Ethereum Crypto Influencer Game 'Fantasy Top' Shutting Down
news.summary: Fantasy Top, a game that reimagines fantasy sports through the lens of Crypto Twitter, will close down two years after its hot launch.

news.title: Nvidia Beats, Stock Dumps—BofA Says Buy the Dip
news.summary: Record $81.6 billion in revenue for Nvidia—and yet the stock fell. Bank of America called the dip noise and raised its price target.

news.title: US Government Makes $2 Billion Bet on Quantum Computing as Threat to Bitcoin Grows
news.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce will invest $2 billion into quantum chip foundries and startups as the "Q-Day" Bitcoin threat nears.

news.title: Crypto Exchange Kraken Secures VARA License to Launch in Dubai
news.summary: Dubai's Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority granted Kraken’s parent company preliminary broker-dealer and investment management authorization.

news.title: Bitcoin accumulation trends weaken as realized losses jump to $600M
news.summary: Bitcoin whales and investors shift to distribution as realized losses surge past $600 million, as BTC price declines toward $76,000.

news.title: 美联储巴尔金：当前政策处于良好状态 长期通胀预期似乎仍然保持在可控范围内
news.summary:
【美联储巴尔金：当前政策处于良好状态 长期通胀预期似乎仍然保持在可控范围内】金色财经报道，5月22日，美联储巴尔金表示，当前政策处于良好状态，能够应对持续的冲击。截至目前，长期通胀预期似乎仍然保持在可控范围内。美联储是否需要加息取决于企业和消费者对不断变化的经济形势的反应；消费者“并不满意”，但仍在继续消费；企业迄今通过自然减员而非裁员来管理生产力提升。

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2378430

news.title: Exploring post-quantum + zk privacy in one experimental chain
news.summary:
I built a from-scratch experimental blockchain to explore some ideas I've been interested in:

– post-quantum signatures (Dilithium)

– custom zk-STARK system (AIR + FRI, written in Rust)

– shielded + anonymous transactions

– simple P2P gossip network

It’s not production-ready (no persistence, no DoS protection, etc.) — this is purely a learning/research project.

The most interesting part was implementing the STARK system

news.title: Maybe the next BTC adoption wave is more about infrastructure than hype
news.summary:
Most ppl focus on price action but the infrastructure side of crypto has been changing a lot lately

Feels like more companies are moving away from the old “10 different vendors for everything” setup and trying to build more integrated systems instead

Less moving parts less operational risk easier compliance etc

If institutions can build and launch BTC related products faster and with fewer headaches that probably matters long term more than
